incorrect_interpretation: Track A or Track B names a physical quantity by itself.
correct_interpretation: They are router lane labels; pair with concrete objects like AFM_like FM_like Dip_depth and stage.
why_it_matters: Mis-labeling collapses incompatible pipelines into one story.
relevant_rule_or_basis: F7X5 R-TRK-001 F7X7 cheatsheet Track row
user_facing_warning: Say which objects and which stage -- Track A or B alone is not enough.

incorrect_interpretation: Bridge components like C_DIP_DEPTH_B are default canonical observables.
correct_interpretation: They are bridge/export alignment rows for pairing and audits not standalone physics tokens.
why_it_matters: Wrong substitution breaks cross-branch pairing gates.
user_facing_warning: Tag bridge/export and branch family; do not headline physics from bridge id alone.

correct_interpretation: FM_abs is magnitude abs(FM_signed); sign is removed.
why_it_matters: Sign reversal narratives cannot be read from FM_abs.
user_facing_warning: If you need sign use FM_signed FM_step_mag matrix export or audits per router.

incorrect_interpretation: FM_step_mag is always magnitude-only because of mag in the name.
correct_interpretation: Wide structured export treats FM_step_mag as signed plateau raw per measurement freeze; verify route and export policy.
user_facing_warning: Do not infer magnitude-only from mag substring alone check export policy.

incorrect_interpretation: tau_effective_seconds can be read like any seconds column.
correct_interpretation: Legacy column requires tau_domain tau_method producer grain units methods disclosure; dual builder contexts share name.
why_it_matters: Silent comparison across incompatible tau summaries.
user_facing_warning: Never plot tau_effective_seconds without the tau metadata bundle.

incorrect_interpretation: R_age style ratios are measured directly from raw traces like DeltaM.
correct_interpretation: Ratios combine prior tau CSV outputs lineage gated not pauseRun decomposition scalars.
why_it_matters: Misallocation of uncertainty and dataset roles.
user_facing_warning: Say which tau files and columns fed the ratio.

incorrect_interpretation: Background baseline residual are universal words meaning one thing.
correct_interpretation: Each maps to distinct contract constructions smooth vs fit plateau vs derivative median vs sharp vs signed dip.
user_facing_warning: Replace vague words with stage plus identity token.

incorrect_interpretation: cfg agingMetricMode fit means Gaussian stage5 fit outputs.
correct_interpretation: Contract labels that flag stage4 direct-family entry analyzeAFM_FM_components not stage5 outputs.
user_facing_warning: Direct-family fit flag is not stage5 Gaussian fit object.
